title: parash #6567
definition:
1) to make distinct, declare, distinguish, separate
    1a) (Qal) to declare, clarify
    1b) (Pual) to be distinctly declared
 2) (Hiphil) to pierce, sting
 3) (Niphal) scatter
nasbUsage:
